eval_dimensions.name: No Auto-Resolve
eval_dimensions.description: Threads are never auto-resolved. Resolution requires explicit user confirmation from the calling skill or user. This applies to all verdicts including INVALID, QUESTION, and OUT_OF_SCOPE.

eval_dimensions.name: Skill-Only Entry Point
eval_dimensions.description: Verdicts (VALID/YAGNI/INVALID/QUESTION/OUT_OF_SCOPE) appear only as the output of Skill(Dev10x:gh-pr-triage). They must NOT appear in narrative text as inline classification without a preceding Skill() call.

eval_dimensions.name: Verdict Output Contract
eval_dimensions.description: Each run returns exactly one verdict from the documented set. VALID returns no reply and no thread action. INVALID/QUESTION/OUT_OF_SCOPE/YAGNI post a reply via mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__pr_comment_reply but do not resolve the thread.

eval_dimensions.name: JTBD Scope Check
eval_dimensions.description: Before returning VALID, Step 4.5 checks whether the commented code is in scope for the PR's stated JTBD. Out-of-scope code with a valid bug report routes to YAGNI, not VALID.

eval_dimensions.name: Task Orchestration
eval_dimensions.description: Three TaskCreate calls fire at startup: fetch-context, validate, draft-verdict.

evals.name: INVALID verdict replies but does not resolve thread
evals.description: Investigation shows the comment is factually wrong (field exists in base class). Skill must post an evidence-based reply and return INVALID. Thread must remain open.

assertions.signal: pr_comment_reply is called to post the evidence-based reply
resolveReviewThread is NOT called — thread left open for user to resolve
Verdict INVALID is returned to the caller

evals.name: VALID verdict returns without reply or thread action
evals.description: Investigation confirms the comment is correct. Skill must return VALID with no reply posted and no thread action taken.

assertions.signal: Verdict VALID is returned to the caller
mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__pr_comment_reply is NOT called for a VALID verdict
resolveReviewThread is NOT called for a VALID verdict

evals.name: YAGNI verdict when commented code is out of scope for PR JTBD
evals.description: Comment is a correct bug report, but Step 4.5 determines the commented code is speculative scope-creep not part of the PR's stated JTBD. Must return YAGNI and post a reply naming the scope mismatch.

assertions.signal: YAGNI verdict returned when code is out of scope for the PR JTBD
Reply mentions scope mismatch and the PR JTBD outcome
Thread is left open after YAGNI reply — caller bundles related verdicts into removal commit

evals.name: Verdicts never appear as inline text without Skill() call
evals.description: Parent caller (gh-pr-respond) processes 3 comments. All 3 verdicts must come from Skill(Dev10x:gh-pr-triage) tool calls, not from narrative text like 'Comment 2 is VALID'.

assertions.signal: Skill(Dev10x:gh-pr-triage) is called for each comment — verdict not written inline
No verdict keyword (VALID/INVALID/YAGNI/QUESTION/OUT_OF_SCOPE) appears in prose before a Skill() call in the same turn

evals.name: Three phase tasks created before any work
evals.description: Skill must create 3 TaskCreate entries at startup before fetching the comment.

assertions.signal: TaskCreate is called 3 times at startup for each orchestration phase
Fetch comment context task is created at startup

trigger_evals.description: Queries that should/should-not trigger the gh-pr-triage skill

should_trigger.rationale: Direct invocation with comment URL — core standalone use case

should_trigger.query: triage the review comment at https://github.com/org/repo/pull/42#discussion_r456 — is it valid?
should_trigger.rationale: Explicit validation request for a single comment

should_trigger.query: check if this review comment is correct before I implement the fix: https://github.com/org/repo/pull/42#discussion_r789
should_trigger.rationale: Validation before implementing — matches skill purpose

should_not_trigger.query: respond to all the review comments on my PR
implement the fix for this review comment
review this PR and post findings
should_not_trigger.rationale: Creating a new review — use Dev10x:gh-pr-review
Direct thread resolution — triage never resolves threads
